sentences.text: Thad and Theo had a thin star on the path.
Theo and Thad got a thin sun at the path.
A thin ship met Thad and Theo on the path.
Thad and Theo ran with a thin jet to Mars.
Theo had a thin Mars and Thad got the sun.
Thad and Theo set a thin ship at the shed.
A thin star sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad let Theo run a thin ship on the path.
Thad got a thin sun and Theo got the jet.
A thin Mars hid with Thad and Theo.
Thad and Theo set a thin star in the shed.
Theo and Thad met a thin star on the path.
A thin sun sat with Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad and Theo set a thin Mars at the path.
Theo got a thin star and Thad got the ship.
A thin jet hid with Thad and Theo.
Thad and Theo set a thin Mars at the shed.
Theo had a thin sun and Thad had the star.
A thin ship ran past Thad with Theo.
Thad and Theo had a thin jet on the path.
